series_description: Business filing forms submitted by businesses/entities/schools listing speech-language pathologists and audiologists they contracted or employed in the previous calendar year.
retention_statement: Paper: Until completion of the next business filing ; Electronic: Until completion of the next business filing

series_description: Daily transactions. In-house supporting documentation (Electronic logs, EDI, memos, etc.)
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Contains all documents regarding investigation of case/complaint.
retention_statement: Paper: Adjudicated cases: Retain in office area for a period of three years. If complaints are non-chargeable or unfounded ; Electronic: Adjudicated cases: Retain in office area for a period of three years. If complaints are non-chargeable or unfounded

series_description: Information pertaining to the audit and compliance with the continuing education requirements. This may include correspondence, certified mail receipts, CE tracking forms, proof of continuing education, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for three years in office area, following completion of continuing education audit ; Electronic: Retain for three years in office area, following completion of continuing education audit

series_description: Annual report submitted electronically to the Governor of Board's official acts during the preceding year.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic annual report permanently ; Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 4744.24

series_description: Applications for all licenses and permits issued by the Board. Also includes required documentation, e.g., transcripts, exam scores , and other documents required by rule.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain all paper in office area for a period of 3 years ; Electronic: Scanned images to be retained indefinitely.

series_description: This record series applies to any electronic mail correspondence related to board business, including attachments sent and received by the Ohio Speech and Hearing Professionals Board
retention_statement: Electronic: The email will be reviewed after one year for further retention based on content before destroying.

series_description: Board meeting minutes documenting board actions occurring at public meetings
Data collected from an electronic timekeeping system to establish payable work hours and attendance.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until State Audit, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved
